headline: Solid SSE swell to 3ft with an offshore morning — the pick of the three days ahead.
today: Dawn and morning are glassy-ish with N offshore and a good-angle swell pushing 3ft at 6s — that's the window. Afternoon swings SSE cross-on and it'll get bumpy, so be out before lunch. Fish or groveler; log if it drops off.

daysToWatch.note: Small at roughly waist-high but a prime angle and glassy light-NNE dawn. Worth a dawn log session before the afternoon ESE fills in.
Solid 3-4ft-plus with strong N offshore morning. Good angle, cleanest of the week — the day to plan around.
